_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist in identifying, prioritizing, and coordinating the protection of critical cyber defense infrastructure and key resources.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.490), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.387). Shared vocabulary: [identifying]. DCWF-only terms [assist, coordinating, critical, cyber, defense, infrastructure] vs WIDAI-only terms [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.886, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assist in identifying, prioritizing, and coordinating the protection of critical" and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 > STS 0.387 (gap +0.111). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [identifying] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [identifying]. DCWF-only: [assist, coordinating, critical, cyber, defense, infrastructure]. WIDAI-only: [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct].
